name: Roark Capital Group
description: Roark Capital Group is a leading private equity firm specializing in franchise, multi-unit, and service-brand investments across the restaurant, retail, and consumer services sectors. Founded in 2001 by Neal Aronson, the firm has assembled one of the most formidable portfolios of iconic brand names in private equity, with particular depth in franchised restaurant and service concepts. Roark is known for its long-term, buy-and-build approach to creating value in its portfolio companies.

portfolioCompanies.name: Inspire Brands
portfolioCompanies.industry: Restaurant (Arby's, Buffalo Wild Wings, Sonic, Jimmy John's, Dunkin')

portfolioCompanies.name: Driven Brands
portfolioCompanies.industry: Automotive Services (Meineke, Maaco, Take 5 Oil Change)
